Frontier orbital energies of water (H₂O) computed at DFT tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fitted RKS) — in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet). Single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz; geometry was NOT re-optimized at this level. SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). Integrity status: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.
